positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a majestic, mythical woodland creature—a blend of fox and stag—sitting amongst stylized ferns and birch branches. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring bold, clean outlines against a clean background. Use a limited color palette of deep forest green, charcoal black, and creamy beige. The style should evoke intricate tattoo flash art and modern folk illustration, emphasizing negative space and strong silhouettes. Cinematic composition, flat lay aesthetic, high contrast, vector style, designed for apparel print.
